Package global.thalion.ttio.importers

Class BrukerTDFReader

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.importers.BrukerTDFReader
public final class BrukerTDFReader extends Object
Bruker timsTOF .d importer

Bruker's .d directory holds two files:

  • analysis.tdf — a plain SQLite database with metadata tables (Frames, GlobalMetadata, Properties, Precursors, ...).
  • analysis.tdf_bin or analysis.tdf_raw — a binary blob with ZSTD-compressed frame data and a scan-to-ion index.

This Java reader consumes the SQLite metadata directly via java.sql + sqlite-jdbc (already a dependency for the SqliteProvider). Binary frame decompression is delegated to the Python ttio.importers.bruker_tdf.read helper through a subprocess, matching the ThermoRawReader → ThermoRawFileParser pattern established in M38.

A native Java port of the frame decoder (ZSTD + Bruker's scan-to-ion index) is a v0.9 concern. For now, callers that want binary extraction must have Python + opentimspy reachable on PATH or via the TTIO_PYTHON env var.

API status: Provisional (v0.8 M53).

Cross-language equivalents: Python ttio.importers.bruker_tdf, Objective-C TTIOBrukerTDFReader.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    BrukerTDFReader.BrukerTDFException
    Raised when the binary extraction path is requested but the Python delegate cannot be located or execution fails.
    static final record 
    BrukerTDFReader.Metadata
    SQLite-level metadata snapshot — no binary extraction required.

    Description
    static Path
    read(Path dDir, Path output)
    Import a Bruker .d directory into an .tio file by delegating binary extraction to the Python helper ttio.importers.bruker_tdf.
    static BrukerTDFReader.Metadata

    Read the SQLite metadata from a Bruker .d directory without touching the binary blob.

  • Method Details

    • readMetadata

      public static BrukerTDFReader.Metadata readMetadata(Path dDir) throws BrukerTDFReader.BrukerTDFException
      Read the SQLite metadata from a Bruker .d directory without touching the binary blob. No external tooling required.
      Throws:
      BrukerTDFReader.BrukerTDFException - if the directory is malformed.

    • read

      public static Path read(Path dDir, Path output) throws BrukerTDFReader.BrukerTDFException
      Import a Bruker .d directory into an .tio file by delegating binary extraction to the Python helper ttio.importers.bruker_tdf.

      The Python interpreter is resolved in this order: TTIO_PYTHON env var → python3 on PATH → python on PATH. The interpreter must have ttio[bruker] installed.

      Parameters:
      dDir - Bruker .d directory.
      output - target .tio output path.
      Throws:
      BrukerTDFReader.BrukerTDFException - if the helper is unreachable or exits non-zero.
